scenario.name: Caller establishes and clears call
scenario.send: INVITE sip:1002@pbx.example.invalid SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP 127.0.0.1:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:1001@pbx.example.invalid>;tag=caller-[call_number] To: <sip:1002@pbx.example.invalid> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:1001@127.0.0.1:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

ACK sip:1002@pbx.example.invalid SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP 127.0.0.1:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] From: <sip:1001@pbx.example.invalid>;tag=caller-[call_number] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 1 ACK Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:1002@pbx.example.invalid SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP 127.0.0.1:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] From: <sip:1001@pbx.example.invalid>;tag=caller-[call_number] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 2 BYE Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
